info.title: My API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for my Laravel application

post.description: Authenticate user and return an API token for protected endpoints
Authenticate admin user and return an API token
Create a new user account and return an API token
Revoke the current admin API token

get.description: Get all items in the authenticated user's cart

post.description: Add a product to the authenticated user's cart

put.description: Update the quantity of an item in the authenticated user's cart

delete.description: Remove an item from the authenticated user's cart

get.description: Get a paginated list of all categories with product counts
Get detailed information about a specific category

delete.description: Delete an existing category (Admin only). Cannot delete categories with products.

get.description: Get all orders for the authenticated user
Get detailed information about a specific order

post.description: Place an order from the authenticated user's cart items

get.description: Get a paginated list of all products with their categories

image.description: Image file (jpeg, png, jpg, gif, webp)

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific product
Get all reviews, optionally filtered by product

post.description: Submit a review for a product (one review per product per user)

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific review

put.description: Update an existing review (must be the review owner)

delete.description: Delete an existing review (must be the review owner)

get.description: Get all items in the authenticated user's wishlist

post.description: Add a product to the authenticated user's wishlist

delete.description: Remove an item from the authenticated user's wishlist
